chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3333 of 2024 ___________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ______________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 18.09-2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for KMC. ------------- A statement has been filed today by the learned counsel appearing on behalf of the KMC under his signature, enclosing a report prepared by the Director Welfare Finance & Accounts KMC, disclosing that certain amounts have already been paid to the Petitioner towards settlement of their retirement / pensionary dues but that following amounts still remaining to be settlement: Petitioner No.1. Rs.558,527/-. Petitioner No.2. Rs.980,269/-. Petitioner No.3. Rs.1,784,872/-. He submits that such amounts would be cleared / settled within a period of thirty days from today. Learned counsel for the Petitioners is satisfied in that regard and seeks disposal of the Petition accordingly. So ordered. By consent, the Petition stands disposed of in view of the statement filed today and undertaken made by the learned counsel appearing on behalf of the KMC JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
